packages.name: fltk
packages.description: FLTK (pronounced fulltick) is a cross-platform C++ GUI toolkit for UNIX/Linux (X11), Microsoft Windows, and MacOS X. FLTK provides modern GUI functionality without the bloat and supports 3D graphics via OpenGL and its built-in GLUT emulation.
packages.comment: This is the port (recipe) consumed by vcpkg.

packages.name: fltk:x64-windows
packages.comment: This is a binary package built by vcpkg.
